parameters.query: SELECT ci.url, ci.title, ci.word_count, ci.content_type, pt.sessions as last_week_sessions, pt.pageviews, pt.bounce_rate FROM web_intel.content_inventory ci LEFT JOIN LATERAL (SELECT SUM(sessions) as sessions, SUM(pageviews) as pageviews, AVG(bounce_rate) as bounce_rate FROM web_intel.page_traffic WHERE page_path = ci.path AND collected_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '7 days') pt ON true WHERE ci.status = 'active' ORDER BY pt.sessions DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 20
SELECT * FROM web_intel.content_decay_candidates ORDER BY decline_percent DESC LIMIT 10

parameters.columns: insight_type, category, title, summary, priority, recommended_actions, data_sources, confidence_score, model_used
